meaning: n.意大利人adj.杜松子酒的,有杜松子酒味的
examples: "My friend Ginny is always short of cash," she says.
Carol admits to being "too embarrassed or something" to demand repayment, but she has resolved to stop lending money to Ginny.
The counter-narratives put forward by the Bishops and by Ginny Polio are also unsustainable.
Polio died in December, 2010, weakened, Ginny believes, by the ordeal of defending himself.
